scope: Chunk 2 - Phase 2 browser/real-use validation after PR #188 merge

preflight.git_status: main...origin/main; only old untracked Phase 1 evidence plus new Phase 2 screenshots present
preflight.head: bdd23485c9c174fff96130fdd2a0cb2bc9c8f28f
preflight.docker_compose: QueryCraft backend/frontend up; postgres, redis, mysql, mssql services healthy where applicable

provider_observation.reason: Live query submission was not reached because the real app had no available database connection and disabled the prompt.

blocker_triage_2026_07_04.root_cause: Stale dev platform DB state after RBAC/source-connection hardening. The configured source_analytics row existed, but was active/untested with no successful schema introspection and no Admin role_connection_policies row. The dbTest-backed Postgres source DB itself was reachable and populated.

fix.summary: Updated the existing E2E seed script to repair the configured source connection from backend environment, run normal health/introspection service methods, and seed the built-in Admin role policy from introspected schema entries.
fix.runtime_repair: Copied the patched support script into the running backend container and executed it there so it used the same Compose network and environment as the real app.

commands.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend python /tmp/seed_e2e_connection.py

cd backend && rtk uv run pytest tests/unit/api/test_connections.py tests/unit/api/test_admin_connections.py tests/unit/services/test_connection_service.py tests/unit/test_role_connection_policy_model.py tests/unit/test_role_endpoints.py -x --tb=short
cd backend && rtk uv run ruff check src/seed_e2e_connection.py
cd backend && rtk uv run ruff format --check src/seed_e2e_connection.py

rerun_after_pr189_2026_07_04.scope: Chunk 2 - Phase 2 browser/real-use validation rerun after PR #189 merge

preflight.git_status: main...origin/main; old local Phase 1 evidence/traces remain untracked
preflight.head: fcfbe99a974db6b757de8f644888117c8057ae4c
preflight.docker_compose: backend/frontend up; postgres platform/source, redis, mysql, and mssql services up; data services healthy where applicable

real_llm.reason: A benign query was submitted through the real UI using the configured Gemini provider and returned SQL plus a result table.

browser_flows.flow: Open frontend and sign in through UI
browser_flows.evidence: Signed in as configured local admin through the UI. Screenshot: audit/full-regression/runs/phase-6-pre-freeze-2026-07-03/screenshots/phase2-05-rerun-signed-in.png

browser_flows.flow: Create a new chat/session and verify prompt focus and draft/preview behavior
browser_flows.evidence: source_analytics was selected, prompt received focus, and draft text remained in the input. Screenshot: audit/full-regression/runs/phase-6-pre-freeze-2026-07-03/screenshots/phase2-06-rerun-draft-focused.png

browser_flows.flow: Submit a benign real query using the configured Gemini provider
browser_flows.evidence: Real query returned a response card. Screenshot: audit/full-regression/runs/phase-6-pre-freeze-2026-07-03/screenshots/phase2-07-rerun-primary-response.png

browser_flows.flow: Verify response card SQL/result/copy/regenerate/reject/accept controls/saved state
browser_flows.evidence: SQL and result table rendered, and saved/delete state was visible, but required copy/regenerate controls were missing from the response card. Reject/accept controls were also not exposed in the current auto-save shell. Screenshot: audit/full-regression/runs/phase-6-pre-freeze-2026-07-03/screenshots/phase2-08-rerun-response-card-fail.png

browser_flows.flow: Verify accepted query appears in History
browser_flows.evidence: Stopped at response-card controls blocker before navigating to History.

browser_flows.flow: Create a second session and switch between sessions; verify isolation
browser_flows.evidence: Stopped at response-card controls blocker.

browser_flows.flow: Verify sidebar grouping enough to identify current/recent sessions
browser_flows.evidence: Stopped at response-card controls blocker.

browser_flows.flow: Delete a session and use undo within the toast window
browser_flows.evidence: Stopped at response-card controls blocker.

browser_flows.flow: Submit a follow-up question and verify prior context behavior is functional
browser_flows.evidence: Stopped at response-card controls blocker.

browser_flows.flow: Use feedback controls if present
browser_flows.evidence: Stopped before feedback inspection because the required response-card controls check failed.

browser_flows.flow: Visit admin settings and verify LLM context cap read/update behavior if exposed
browser_flows.evidence: Stopped at response-card controls blocker.

browser_flows.flow: Switch to Arabic locale and verify RTL mirroring while SQL/code remains LTR
browser_flows.evidence: Stopped at response-card controls blocker.

blocker.summary: Required copy/regenerate controls were absent from a successful real-query response card; only saved/delete state was visible.

browser_flows.flow: Open frontend and sign in through UI
browser_flows.evidence: Signed in as configured local admin through the UI; credential values not captured.

browser_flows.flow: Create a new chat/session and verify prompt focus/draft/preview behavior
browser_flows.evidence: After New Chat, prompt textarea was disabled with placeholder: Please add a database connection first. This prevents prompt focus, draft entry, session creation, and preview verification.

browser_flows.flow: Submit benign real query using configured Gemini provider
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked by disabled prompt/no available database connection.

browser_flows.flow: Verify response card SQL/result/copy/regenerate/reject/accept/saved state
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked before query submission.

browser_flows.flow: Verify accepted query appears in History
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked before query submission.

browser_flows.flow: Create second session and verify session isolation
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked before first session could be created.

browser_flows.flow: Verify sidebar grouping
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked before session creation.

browser_flows.flow: Delete a session and undo
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked before session creation.

browser_flows.flow: Submit follow-up question and verify prior context behavior
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked before initial query submission.

browser_flows.flow: Use feedback controls if present
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked before response card creation.

browser_flows.flow: Admin settings context cap read/update
browser_flows.evidence: Not run after first required browser-flow blocker.

browser_flows.flow: Arabic RTL mirroring while SQL/code remains LTR
browser_flows.evidence: Not run after first required browser-flow blocker.

remaining_flows_after_spec_drift_2026_07.scope: Chunk 2 - Phase 2 remaining browser/user flows after response-card spec-drift triage

preflight.docker_compose: backend/frontend up; postgres platform/source, redis, mysql, and mssql services up; data services healthy where applicable

browser_flows.flow: Verify accepted/saved query appears in History
browser_flows.evidence: History filter found saved auto-accepted query for marker P2R-mr69b2ca-A. Screenshot: audit/full-regression/runs/phase-6-pre-freeze-2026-07-03/screenshots/phase2-11-remaining-history-saved-query.png

browser_flows.flow: Create a second session and switch between sessions; verify isolation
browser_flows.evidence: Second session returned film count 1000; switching between P2R-mr69b2ca-A and P2R-mr69b2ca-B showed only the active session's workspace turns. Screenshots: phase2-12-remaining-second-session-response.png, phase2-13-remaining-session-switch-isolation.png

browser_flows.flow: Verify sidebar grouping enough to identify current/recent sessions
browser_flows.evidence: Sidebar displayed the Today group and current/recent marker previews while switching sessions.

browser_flows.flow: Delete a session/query and use undo if exposed
browser_flows.evidence: Session delete exposed the 5-second undo toast; Undo restored the session before deletion. Screenshot: audit/full-regression/runs/phase-6-pre-freeze-2026-07-03/screenshots/phase2-15-remaining-delete-undo-toast.png

browser_flows.flow: Submit a follow-up question and verify prior context behavior is functional
browser_flows.evidence: Follow-up in the first session returned customer count 599 and remained in the same session. Screenshot: audit/full-regression/runs/phase-6-pre-freeze-2026-07-03/screenshots/phase2-14-remaining-follow-up-context.png

browser_flows.flow: Use feedback controls if present
browser_flows.evidence: WorkspacePage exposes no response-feedback-bar or thumbs controls in the current contract; implicit feedback/auto-save remains active.

browser_flows.flow: Visit admin settings and verify LLM context cap read/update behavior if exposed
browser_flows.evidence: Settings read context cap 3, updated it to 4, showed saved state, then restored it to 3. Screenshot: audit/full-regression/runs/phase-6-pre-freeze-2026-07-03/screenshots/phase2-16-remaining-admin-settings-context-cap.png

browser_flows.flow: Switch to Arabic locale and verify RTL mirroring while SQL/code remains LTR
browser_flows.evidence: Arabic locale set html/app shell dir=rtl, moved sidebar to the right, showed Arabic shell labels, and expanded SQL highlighter retained dir=ltr. Screenshot: audit/full-regression/runs/phase-6-pre-freeze-2026-07-03/screenshots/phase2-17-remaining-arabic-rtl-workspace.png

spec_drift: Response card Copy/Regenerate controls are absent in some current WorkspacePage renders; SQL/result/Delete remain present and the prior triage classified this as current-contract spec drift.
WorkspacePage feedback controls are absent; current contract relies on implicit feedback/auto-save.

security_privacy.notes: Evidence is summarized. Credentials were read from .env for UI login but not stored in evidence.
